function.name: getOrderByPhone
function.description: Look up all orders associated with a phone number. Returns order details including ID, customer name, price, expected pickup date, notes, order type, tracker stage, payment status, and garment type. Primary lookup when a customer calls in. Returns up to 5 most recent orders.

phone.description: Customer phone number exactly as stored, e.g. +14155551234

function.name: getOrderById
function.description: Look up a specific order by its ORDER_ID value. Use this when the customer provides their order number verbally during the call.

orderId.description: The ORDER_ID value provided by the customer

function.name: lookupPrice
function.description: Look up the price for a specific garment type from the pricing schedule. Use when a customer asks how much something costs, or to auto-fill the price when updating an order.

garmentType.description: The garment type to look up, e.g. Shirt, Pants, Dress, Suit

orderType.description: Whether to get the regular or expedited price

function.name: listAllPrices
function.description: Return the full pricing schedule — all garment types with their regular and expedited prices. Use when a customer asks for a general price list.

function.name: searchOrdersByName
function.description: Search for orders by customer name. Use as fallback when getOrderByPhone finds nothing — e.g. customer calling from a different number. Always confirm identity before reading or updating any data.

name.description: Customer name or partial name to search for

function.name: cancelOrder
function.description: Mark an order as Cancelled. Use when a customer calls to cancel before pickup. Always confirm with the customer before calling this.

pageId.description: Notion page ID from getOrderByPhone or getOrderById

function.name: triggerPickupCall
function.description: Initiate an outbound call to notify a customer their order is ready for pickup. Only call if NOTIFIED_AT is not already set on the order.

pageId.description: Notion page ID from getOrderByPhone or getOrderById

phone.description: Customer phone in E.164 format e.g. +14155551234

customerName.description: Customer name to pass to the voice agent

function.name: appendOrderNote
function.description: Append a note to an existing order. Use to record customer preferences, special handling instructions, or any NLP-captured information from the call. Previous notes are preserved.

pageId.description: Notion page ID returned by getOrderByPhone or getOrderById (the pageId field)

note.description: Text to append to the order notes. Be specific and concise.

function.name: setOrderType
function.description: Change an order's type — e.g. upgrade Regular to Expedited. Consider calling lookupPrice afterward to update the price accordingly.

pageId.description: Notion page ID returned by getOrderByPhone or getOrderById (the pageId field)

orderType.description: The new order type to set

function.name: updateTracker
function.description: Update how far along an order is in the cleaning process.

pageId.description: Notion page ID returned by getOrderByPhone or getOrderById (the pageId field)

stage.description: The current stage of the order

function.name: updatePayment
function.description: Record or update how and when an order was paid. Set paymentDate to today's date when marking as paid. Set paymentDate to null if not yet paid.

pageId.description: Notion page ID returned by getOrderByPhone or getOrderById (the pageId field)

paymentDate.description: Date payment was received in YYYY-MM-DD format. Null if not yet paid.

function.name: updateGarmentType
function.description: Set or correct the garment type on an order. After updating, consider calling lookupPrice to sync the price from the pricing schedule.

pageId.description: Notion page ID returned by getOrderByPhone or getOrderById (the pageId field)

function.name: requestCallback
function.description: Log a callback request on an order so staff know to follow up with the customer. Use when: the customer wants to confirm expedited capacity, the item needs a custom quote, or only staff can answer the question.

pageId.description: Notion page ID returned by getOrderByPhone or getOrderById (the pageId field)

reason.description: Why the customer wants a callback, e.g. 'Confirming expedited capacity for suit pickup Friday'

function.name: updateOrderPrice
function.description: Update the price on an order. Use after lookupPrice returns a price, or when a staff member authorizes a manual price change.

pageId.description: Notion page ID returned by getOrderByPhone or getOrderById (the pageId field)

function.name: updateOrderExpectedDate
function.description: Update the expected delivery/pickup date on an order. Use when a customer is told a new date during the call.

pageId.description: Notion page ID returned by getOrderByPhone or getOrderById (the pageId field)

expectedDate.description: New expected date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. 2025-05-20)
